svg.text: TB6600 + 2x TMC2209 Stepper Drivers | ESP32-S3-N16R8 | 24V Power
Check motor datasheet for wire color mapping
Size for total motor current draw
1. EN/ENA (Enable) is active LOW: pull LOW to enable driver, HIGH to disable (default state in code)
2. STEP/PUL pulse: 5us HIGH pulse per step. Rising edge triggers one microstep.
3. TB6600: DIP switch set to 2/B for half-stepping (400 steps/rev). Signal pins are differential (+/-) connect - pins to GND.
4. TMC2209 MS pin config: Both HIGH = 1/16 step (MS1=VIO, MS2=VIO). Add 100uF cap across VS/GND on each driver.
5. Common ground between ESP32, TB6600, and both TMC2209 boards is critical.
